```
_F_o_r_m_a_t _D_o_c_s _S_u_m_m_a_r_y _a_s _M_a_r_k_d_o_w_n

_D_e_s_c_r_i_p_t_i_o_n:

     Creates a compact summary of package documentation.

_U_s_a_g_e:

_A_r_g_u_m_e_n_t_s:

     Character string of markdown
```

## fyi_docs

*Get All Help Documentation for a Package*

```
_G_e_t _A_l_l _H_e_l_p _D_o_c_u_m_e_n_t_a_t_i_o_n _f_o_r _a _P_a_c_k_a_g_e

_D_e_s_c_r_i_p_t_i_o_n:

     Extracts all help documentation as markdown, suitable for LLM
     consumption.

_U_s_a_g_e:

     fyi_docs(package, topics)
     
_A_r_g_u_m_e_n_t_s:

 package: Character. Package name.

  topics: Optional character vector of specific topics to include.

_V_a_l_u_e:

     Character string of markdown, invisibly. Also prints to console.

_E_x_a_m_p_l_e_s:

     ## Not run:
     
     fyi_docs("sttapi")
     fyi_docs("sttapi", topics = c("transcribe", "set_stt_base"))
     ## End(Not run)
     
```

## fyi_exports

*List Exported Functions*

```
_L_i_s_t _E_x_p_o_r_t_e_d _F_u_n_c_t_i_o_n_s

_D_e_s_c_r_i_p_t_i_o_n:

     Returns functions exported by a package.

_U_s_a_g_e:

     fyi_exports(package, pattern)
     
_A_r_g_u_m_e_n_t_s:

 package: Character. Package name.

 pattern: Optional regex to filter function names.

_V_a_l_u_e:

     A data.frame with columns: name, args.

_E_x_a_m_p_l_e_s:

     ## Not run:
     
     fyi_exports("sttapi")
     ## End(Not run)
     
```

```
_L_i_s_t _H_e_l_p _T_o_p_i_c_s _f_o_r _a _P_a_c_k_a_g_e

_D_e_s_c_r_i_p_t_i_o_n:

_U_s_a_g_e:

_A_r_g_u_m_e_n_t_s:

_V_a_l_u_e:

_E_x_a_m_p_l_e_s:

     ## Not run:
     
     fyi_help_topics("sttapi")
     ## End(Not run)
     
```

## fyi_help

*Get Help Documentation for a Topic*

```
_G_e_t _H_e_l_p _D_o_c_u_m_e_n_t_a_t_i_o_n _f_o_r _a _T_o_p_i_c

_D_e_s_c_r_i_p_t_i_o_n:

     Extracts help documentation as plain text, suitable for LLM
     consumption.

_U_s_a_g_e:

     fyi_help(topic, package)
     
_A_r_g_u_m_e_n_t_s:

   topic: Character. The topic to get help for.

 package: Character. Package name.

_V_a_l_u_e:

     Character string of help text, invisibly. Also prints to console.

_E_x_a_m_p_l_e_s:

     ## Not run:
     
     fyi_help("transcribe", "sttapi")
     ## End(Not run)
     
```

## fyi_internals

*List Internal (Non-Exported) Functions*

```
_L_i_s_t _I_n_t_e_r_n_a_l (_N_o_n-_E_x_p_o_r_t_e_d) _F_u_n_c_t_i_o_n_s

_D_e_s_c_r_i_p_t_i_o_n:

     Returns functions defined in a package namespace but not exported.

_U_s_a_g_e:

     fyi_internals(package, pattern)
     
_A_r_g_u_m_e_n_t_s:

 package: Character. Package name.

 pattern: Optional regex to filter function names.

_V_a_l_u_e:

     A data.frame with columns: name, args, internal (all TRUE).

_E_x_a_m_p_l_e_s:

     ## Not run:
     
     fyi_internals("sttapi")
     fyi_internals("sttapi", pattern = "^\.")
     ## End(Not run)
     
```

## fyi_options

*Extract Option Names from Package Source*

```
_E_x_t_r_a_c_t _O_p_t_i_o_n _N_a_m_e_s _f_r_o_m _P_a_c_k_a_g_e _S_o_u_r_c_e

_D_e_s_c_r_i_p_t_i_o_n:

     Scans R source files for getOption() and options() calls to find
     option names used by a package.

_U_s_a_g_e:

     fyi_options(package, src_dir)
     
_A_r_g_u_m_e_n_t_s:

 package: Character. Package name (must be installed).

 src_dir: Optional. Path to source directory. If NULL, uses installed
          package location.

_V_a_l_u_e:

     A data.frame with columns: option, file, type (get/set).

_E_x_a_m_p_l_e_s:

     ## Not run:
     
     fyi_options("sttapi")
     fyi_options("sttapi", src_dir = "~/sttapi")
     ## End(Not run)
     
```

## fyi

*Get Complete Package Information for LLMs*

```
_G_e_t _C_o_m_p_l_e_t_e _P_a_c_k_a_g_e _I_n_f_o_r_m_a_t_i_o_n _f_o_r _L_L_M_s

_D_e_s_c_r_i_p_t_i_o_n:

     The main function - returns everything an LLM needs to understand
     a package, including exports, internals, options, and optionally
     full documentation.

_U_s_a_g_e:

     fyi(package, src_dir, internals, options, exports, docs)
     
_A_r_g_u_m_e_n_t_s:

 package: Character. Package name.

 src_dir: Optional path to source directory for options extraction.

internals: Logical. Include internal functions? Default TRUE.

 options: Logical. Include option names? Default TRUE.

 exports: Logical. Include exported functions? Default TRUE.

    docs: Logical. Include full documentation? Default FALSE (can be
          verbose).

_V_a_l_u_e:

     Character string of markdown, invisibly. Also prints to console.

_E_x_a_m_p_l_e_s:

     ## Not run:
     
     fyi("sttapi")
     fyi("llamaR", internals = TRUE, options = FALSE)
     fyi("sttapi", docs = TRUE)  # Include full help docs
     ## End(Not run)
     
```

## use_fyi_md

*Create Persistent fyi.md File*

```
_C_r_e_a_t_e _P_e_r_s_i_s_t_e_n_t _f_y_i._m_d _F_i_l_e

_D_e_s_c_r_i_p_t_i_o_n:

     Generates package information and writes it to a markdown file for
     persistent LLM context in your project.

_U_s_a_g_e:

     use_fyi_md(package, path, src_dir, internals, options, exports, docs, append)
     
_A_r_g_u_m_e_n_t_s:

 package: Character. Package name.

    path: File path to write. Default "fyi.md" in current directory.

 src_dir: Optional path to source directory for options extraction.

internals: Logical. Include internal functions? Default TRUE.

 options: Logical. Include option names? Default TRUE.

 exports: Logical. Include exported functions? Default TRUE.

    docs: Logical. Include full documentation? Default FALSE.

  append: Logical. Append to existing file? Default FALSE (overwrite).

_V_a_l_u_e:

     The file path, invisibly.

_E_x_a_m_p_l_e_s:

     ## Not run:
     
     # Create fyi.md for a package
     use_fyi_md("sttapi")
     
     # Custom path
     use_fyi_md("sttapi", path = "docs/sttapi-context.md")
     
     # Multiple packages in one file
     use_fyi_md("sttapi", path = "context.md")
     use_fyi_md("ttsapi", path = "context.md", append = TRUE)
     
     # Include full docs
     use_fyi_md("sttapi", docs = TRUE)
     ## End(Not run)
     
```
